result.reason: To provide a lightweight, embedded NoSQL database option for new beta features and integrations, offering flexibility and an alternative to existing SQL-based connectors, specifically for new data models.
result.approach: Introduce LiteDB as an embedded NoSQL database by adding the LiteDB NuGet package and establishing a dedicated data access layer (e.g., context and unit of work) to manage LiteDB instances and operations. This will allow new beta integrations to leverage LiteDB's document-oriented capabilities without being constrained by the existing SQL-centric IDatabaseConnector.
